project: Generic Intelligence Strategy — Deterministic AI Context + Scope System
description: Two-layer system: (1) .ai-context/ serves architectural docs via MCP; (2) scope-intelligence-toolkit/ indexes code scope per-repo. Together they eliminate repo-wide scanning by AI assistants.

context_docs.description: Project knowledge base: architecture, constraints, playbooks, current phase.

code_scope.description: Per-repo code index: features, symbols, dependencies, tests, touchpoints, call graph.

generated.purpose: Defines the core idea, goals, and benefits of the deterministic token-saving system.
Outlines the layered architecture: instructions, scope index, update engine, retrieval interface, and execution layer.
Details deterministic update engine modes, hook strategies, and automation principles.
Describes retrieval API design, compact query outputs, and subagent exploration strategy.
Explains global vs repo memory, long-term memory strategy, and token-efficiency rules.
Defines validation workflows for debugging and enhancement, including risk analysis.
Outlines subagent roles: Explore, Plan, Main Agent, Validation Helper.
Provides schema examples for feature maps and symbol-level dependency narrowing.
Detailed wiring guide for Claude Code: CLAUDE.md rules, hook configs, sample skill, verification steps.
Phased implementation plan (Phase 1–4), deliverables, and guiding principles.
Defines MCP query contract methods for deterministic retrieval of context slices.

curated.purpose: Tracks phased implementation strategy and minimum viable deliverables.
Lists constraints and rules to avoid token bloat and inefficiency.
Maps toolkit modules, repo-local scope files, and supporting tools.

readme.purpose: Explains the purpose of the .ai-context/ folder, usage guidelines, and extensibility notes.
